case_title: PARKSIDE LENDING, LLC VS. GURBIR MAROKE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PARKSIDE LENDING, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MAROKE, GURBIR AMERICAN DREAM PROPERTIES CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-22-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF PARKSIDE LENDING, LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED (SERVICE FEE $49.50) SERVED SEP-17-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MAROKE, GURBIR
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKSIDE LENDING, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-22-2008 - CONTINUED TO DEC-03-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES ARE PRESENT, HOWEVER THE DEFANDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. CONTINED FOR COMMISSIONER SLAVIT TO HEAR CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKSIDE LENDING, LLC
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-03-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO GURBIR MAROKE BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-03-2008 AT 8:30AM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARKSIDE LENDING, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN DREAM PROPERTIES CORPORATION $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $103.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,103.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS FULL SATISFACTION OF ANY CLAIM PLAINTIFF MAY HAVE IN CONNECTION WITH THE SUBJECT LOAN PAYOFF. DEFENDANT GURBIR MAROKE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
